reference: Dear friend, statins, which you are taking, can cause elevation in liver enzymes. I really don't see any point in getting a magnetic resonance imaging scan at this point in time. You should get a complete liver function test and an ultrasound of your abdomen. Review with us; your statin dose may have to be modified. Stay healthy.
text: Dear friend, statins which you are taking can cause elevation in liver enzymes. I really don't see any point in getting a magnetic resonance imaging scan at this point in time. You should get a complete liver function test and an ultrasound of your abdomen. Review with us. Your statin dose may have to be modified. Stay healthy.
